keyPointsSummary: Revise all major tense forms and modal verbs learned across Days 1-73
Recall the biggest vocabulary categories: daily life, office, professional, emotions
Speaking fluency comes from repeating full sentences aloud, not memorising isolated words
Every sentence should still follow correct subject-verb agreement

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं हर दिन अंग्रेज़ी बोलने का अभ्यास करता हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I practise speaking English every day.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह पहले से बेहतर बोलता है।
अगर मैं मेहनत करूँ, तो सफल हो जाऊँगा।
quickQuiz.answer: If I work hard, I will succeed.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह जल्द आएगा।
quickQuiz.answer: He said that he would come soon.
I have to read this book.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह तीन साल से यहाँ काम कर रहा है।
quickQuiz.answer: He has been working here for three years.

quickQuiz.hindi: तुम बहुत अच्छे इंसान हो, है ना?
quickQuiz.answer: You are a very good person, aren't you?

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे अंग्रेज़ी बोलने में आत्मविश्वास है।
quickQuiz.answer: I have confidence in speaking English.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैंने अपनी गलतियों से सीखा है।
quickQuiz.answer: I have learned from my mistakes.

mustRememberRules: Revise all major tense forms and modal verbs learned across Days 1-73
Recall the biggest vocabulary categories: daily life, office, professional, emotions
Speaking fluency comes from repeating full sentences aloud, not memorising isolated words
Every sentence should still follow correct subject-verb agreement
